preregistration.chance_rate_estimator: Monte Carlo, P(null RMS <= model RMS)

pass_threshold.vs_random_null: model RMS below the 5th percentile of the random-null RMS distribution (chance rate < 0.05)

preregistration.instrument_rejection: if the random null's chance rate of 'matching' exceeds ~0.50 the metric is saturated and is rejected as an instrument (the failure mode that killed v1's blind test)
